metadata.title: Cave Escape
metadata.description: Navigate a dangerous cave while avoiding enemies in adventure mode or survive infinite waves in endless mode. Progress through five escalating levels in adventure mode, or face endless waves of enemies with difficulty scaling (easy/normal/hard). Use arrow keys to move and the dash mechanic (X button) to dodge. Master the dash mechanic - Level 4 teaches tight corridor navigation while Level 5 presents expert rapid-dash challenges. In endless mode, survive waves, rack up score multipliers, and beat your best score.
